name: clawcamp-tests
description: ClawCamp's quality wall. Playwright (xss + a11y + rls-coverage) and Lighthouse budgets now RUN IN CI (.github/workflows/ci.yml) as the v2.0.0 exit criterion — the v1.x 'NOT wired into CI / curl-only' deferral is over. Run locally with: npm install && npx playwright install chromium && npm run test:e2e
